overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a snowy, stormy mountain pass at night. The character ascends from a grassy lower trail through rocky ruins to a summit shrine, then continues along a narrow cliff edge with expansive valley views.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail at lower elevation

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snowy mountain trail toward the distant peaks

entered.detail: large snow-covered mountain slope forming the left boundary of the valley
steep snow-covered mountain rising on the right side
snowy mountain peak visible in the distance between the valley
leafless gnarled tree standing alone on the path ahead

segments.scene_description: Beginning the ascent on a wide snowy trail through an open mountain valley. The path is surrounded by sparse grass and patches of snow, with large mountain ranges visible in the distance under a stormy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain pass with ancient stone ruins

events.description: trail narrows and enters a rocky passage flanked by stone ruins

agents.ego_description: climbing upward through the rocky pass between stone walls

entered.detail: ancient stone walls and rubble lining the left side of the path
weathered stone structures and boulders on the right side

segments.scene_description: The path ascends through a narrower rocky section lined with ancient stone ruins on both sides. The terrain becomes more rugged and enclosed as the character climbs higher toward the summit.

events.description: approaching a stone shrine with lit candles on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: approaching a candle-lit shrine at the mountain summit, observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: mysterious figure in red robes standing near the shrine ahead on the path

entered.detail: ancient stone altar with burning candles and offerings
tall wooden pole with tattered flag marking the summit
humanoid figure standing near the path ahead

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the rocky pass onto the open summit where a stone shrine with burning candles sits to the left. A mysterious figure in red stands near the path ahead as the character continues past the shrine toward the cliff edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cliff edge path with steep drop

events.description: path becomes narrow cliff edge with steep drop to the valley below

agents.ego_description: carefully walking along the narrow cliff edge path with a steep drop to the right

entered.detail: steep cliff drop-off falling away to the valley below
expansive view of fog-filled valleys and distant mountain ranges

segments.scene_description: The trail narrows to a dangerous cliff edge with a steep drop into the foggy valley below. The character walks carefully along the path as the landscape opens to reveal expansive views of the distant mountains and valleys shrouded in mist.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent from a wide, snowy mountain valley toward a precarious cliffside summit under a stormy night sky. It begins on an open trail surrounded by sparse grass and distant peaks before the path narrows and climbs through a rugged section lined with ancient stone ruins. As the terrain becomes more enclosed, the camera emerges from the rocky pass onto an open summit featuring a stone shrine with burning candles and a mysterious figure in red. The scene then shifts as the character moves past the shrine, with the trail thinning into a dangerous cliff edge. Finally, the landscape opens completely to reveal expansive, mist-shrouded views of the distant mountains and the deep valley below.
